Tip of the day
Hunting activities that require inputs get bonuses from using FINE versions of them! Check the interface for what they give!

Wolf hunting

This page contains changes which are not marked for translation.
Wolf hunting
Main Skill: Hunting
Max Efficiency: 150%

You follow large paw prints in the ground in search of the widespread forest hunter, the wolf. Your bow and arrow is ready to strike one down.

The Wolf hunting activity is a Hunting activity.

Location

This activity can be done at the following location:

  • Sanguine Hills in Jarvonia

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirements

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Hunting lvl. 25.

Keyword Requirements:

  • Have Hunting bow equipped.

Item Required

This activity requires the following item be supplied for each action:

  • Needs 1x Arrows

Experience Information

Skill Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Total Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
XP/Step 		Total Max
XP/Step
Hunting 161 294 0.548 0.548 196 0.821 0.821

Drop Tables

Main Drops

Item Name Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R. Value
Single (Stack)
Hide scraps 5-8 75.000% ~1 in 2 45 steps 30 steps 0 (0-0)
Animal meat 2 36.000% ~1 in 5 368 steps 245 steps 1 (2)
Basic hide 2 36.000% ~1 in 5 368 steps 245 steps 1 (2)
Bones 1 13.510% ~1 in 14 2,100 steps 1,400 steps 1 (1)
Animal fur 1 5.910% ~1 in 33 4,900 steps 3,267 steps 5 (5)

†Note: This table is rolled 2 times.

Secondary Drops

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.

Item Name Item Type Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.
Hunting chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 73,500 steps 49,000 steps
